paper_title: Factors influencing group work of students in learning English as a foreign language (EFL): A case study at a Vietnamese university

entities.id: Factors influencing group work of students in learning English as a foreign language (EFL): A case study at a Vietnamese university
entities.description: The title and primary research focus of the paper.

entities.id: English as a Foreign Language (EFL) Education
entities.description: The main field of study concerning English instruction to non-native speakers.
Primary author affiliated with Can Tho University of Medicine and Pharmacy.
Secondary author affiliated with Center for Foreign Languages, Can Tho University.

entities.id: School of Medicine, Can Tho University of Medicine and Pharmacy
entities.description: Higher education institution in Vietnam.

entities.id: Center for Foreign Languages, Can Tho University
entities.description: Academic center within Can Tho University.
Teaching strategy used to develop students’ communicative proficiency.
Approach focusing on developing learners' communicative competence.
Research design combining quantitative (questionnaires) and qualitative (interviews) data.
Quantitative tool using a 30-item five-point Likert-scale.
Qualitative data collection tool with open and ended questions.
Statistical software used for data analysis.
Statistical test to investigate significant differences between mean scores.

entities.id: Survey and interview data from 272 students
entities.description: Numeric and qualitative data collected from first-year university participants.
Internal consistency measurement of the questionnaire.
Average score across factors compared to the value of 3.0.
Average importance score for the student interaction factor.
Average importance score for the teacher's role factor.
Average importance score for the classroom context factor.
Average importance score for the task factor.
